hypnoneuro.title: 🧠 HypnoNeuro
hypnoneuro.summary: Gamified decentralized mental wellness platform. 27 browser-based games across 3 levels. MetaMask-gated. Token + NFT reward model.
completed: HypnoNeuroToken (HNT) deployed and verified on Sepolia
MindMasteryNFT (L1–L3) deployed and verified on Sepolia
Payment flow spec locked: Insurance → ClaimChain, Fiat → Stripe, Crypto → MetaMask
Symptom checklist and neurotransmitter system selection spec locked
27-game spec locked: 9 L1 Hypnosis, 9 L2 Orthomolecular, 9 L3 Inner-Child
L1 Game 1 (Threshold Bloom — GABA/mandala breathing) spec locked
next: Build Threshold Bloom (L1 Game 1) — GABA mandala breathing game

encrypthealth.title: 🔐 EncryptHealth
encrypthealth.summary: Sovereign health data platform. EHT token. PostgreSQL backend. Blockchain-anchored health records. 19-step build — currently on Step 3.
completed: EncryptHealthToken (EHT) deployed and verified on Sepolia
MetaMask login live on Vercel (Step 2 complete)
next: Step 3 — Build health records API (Node.js + Express)
Step 4 — PostgreSQL schema integration (ClaimChain + EncryptHealth merge)
Step 5 — Blockchain writes (SHA-256 anchoring to Sepolia)

claimchain.title: ⛓ ClaimChain
claimchain.summary: Sovereign health governance infrastructure. Tracks on-chain session billing, provider attestations, HypnoNeuro session credits. NOT a medical or insurance system.
completed: ClaimChain contract deployed and verified on Sepolia
next: Wire ClaimChain eligibility check into HypnoNeuro payment flow

neurobalance.title: ⌚ NeuroBalance Watch
neurobalance.summary: Wearable prototype concept with neurotransmitter dashboards and on-chain consent toggles. Plant ally recommendations. Vercel deploy pending.
next: Connect watch simulator to EncryptHealth API
Connect watch events to L1–L3 game launch
